name: WOLVERINE
description: Thanks to his regenerative healing factor and berserker rage, the centuries-old Logan can fight through the worst pain to go claw-to-claw with any foe. The Wolverine stands ready to shred through all obstacles in his way with his Adamantium claws.
lore: Gifted with a powerful healing factor and razor sharp claws, the Mutant called Logan was turned into a living weapon when the clandestine government organization Weapon X bonded indestructible Adamantium to his skeleton. Wolverine has proven to be more than a killing machine, finding ways to rise above his pain to do what's right for Mutants and humans alike. Now, Logan splits his time between battling Doom 2099 and ushering Mutants to safety on Krakoa. Even in the far future, Wolverine remains the best there is at what he does.

abilities.name: Savage Claw
abilities.description: Slash with Adamantium claws for a Claw Strike. Unleashing Feral Leap will enhance it to Berserk Claw Strike for a brief period

stats.Percentage Damage: Deal damage equal to 1.5% of the target's Max Health, with an extra 0.057% damage for each point of Rage
stats.Attack Interval: The first three strikes have an interval of 0.27s between them, while the fourth strike has a 0.84s interval from the third strike

abilities.name: Last Stand
abilities.description: Knock enemies ahead airborne and spiral through the air, sweeping up enemies along the path and delivering a devastating impact at the landing point

stats.Impact Percentage Damage: Deal damage equal to 10% of the target's Max Health, with an extra 0.3% damage for each point of Rage

abilities.name: Feral Leap
abilities.description: Leap like an animal to snatch the first enemy upon impact and Smash them to the ground. Unleashing this ability will enhance his normal attack to Berserk Claw Strike for a brief period

stats.Berserk Claw Strike Percentage Damage: Deal damage equal to 1% of the target's Max Health, with an extra 0.035% damage for each point of Rage

abilities.name: Undying Animal
abilities.description: Unleash a fierce howl to briefly reduce incoming damage

abilities.name: Vicious Rampage
abilities.description: Dash forward and unleash a Claw Strike

stats.Percentage Damage: Deal damage equal to 1.5% of the target's Max Health, with an extra 0.057% damage for each point of Rage

abilities.name: Regenerative Healing Factor
abilities.description: Begin to heal and rise with a hefty Bonus Health, shaking off all debuffs. After a brief moment, any remaining Bonus Health morphs into a one-off heal, zeroing out his Rage. Assists in KOs reduce this cooldown

abilities.name: Berserker Rage
abilities.description: Rage builds when Wolverine attacks or takes hits, boosting the damage of his Claw Strikes and the Bonus Health from his regenerative healing factor

received.name: Phoenix Warrior
received.description: Wolverine and Hulk can interact with each other. Once both parties confirm, Hulk can lift Wolverine and press the key to hurl him forwardJean Grey imbues Wolverine with the awe-inspiring Phoenix Force. With this power, Wolverine's Feral Leap transforms into Phoenix Warrior. While active, he is enveloped in Phoenix flames that continuously scorch him and nearby enemies, dealing Percentage Damage. In this state, Wolverine's abilities gain Lifesteal when inflicting damage

stats.Spell Field Damage: Deal damage equals to target's 1% Maximum Health per second
stats.Berserk Claw Strike Percentage Damage: Deal damage equal to 1% of the target's Max Health, with an extra 0.035% damage for each point of Rage.

received.name: Kinetic Claws
received.description: Cyclops supercharges Wolverine's claws, extending his attack range. While active, Wolverine's Vicious Rampage is replaced with Kinetic Claws, granting him a brief forward lunge that unleashes a flurry of slashes around him

base.description: Activation extends the attack range of Savage Claw and Berserk Claw Strike. Vicious Rampage is replaced with Kinetic Claws, granting a brief forward lunge that unleashes a flurry of slashes around.

stats.Kinetic Claws Damage: 5 + 0.01% of Max Health as damage per Rage point

enhanced.description: When teaming up with Cyclops, Blast Slash is permanently active.

base.description: Upon activation, Wolverine receives Kinetic Enhancement, gaining increased Movement Speed and a Jump Boost. Attacking enemies applies Kinetic Particles that detonate after a short delay for bonus damage. The effect lasts for duration.

enhanced.description: When teaming up with Gambit, Wolverine receives Continuous Healing for the entire duration of the ability.
